description: CI failure mode evidence and troubleshooting guides

failureModes.name: Build script failure - javascript-obfuscator
symptoms: TypeError: JavaScriptObfuscator.obfuscate is not a function
resolution: Check package.json has javascript-obfuscator in devDependencies
prevention: Add CI step to verify dependency installation

failureModes.name: Firebase configuration error
prevention: Use environment variables for sensitive config
Add Firebase config validation in CI

failureModes.name: Vercel deployment failure
resolution: Check vercel.json exists and is valid
Verify build script produces correct output in dist/
Check file sizes in dist/ directory

failureModes.name: Network connectivity failure
symptoms: Failed to connect to github.com port 443
resolution: Configure git proxy if needed: git config --global http.proxy <proxy>
prevention: Use CI environment with stable network
Cache dependencies to reduce network calls

failureModes.name: Node.js version incompatibility
symptoms: Error: The engine 'node' is incompatible with this module
rootCauses: Using modern ES features without transpilation
resolution: Add .nvmrc or engines field in package.json
Use nvm to manage Node versions
prevention: Specify Node version in CI configuration

failureModes.name: Source map generation failure
symptoms: ENOENT: no such file or directory
resolution: Verify src/ directory exists with app.js and parser.js
prevention: Add file existence checks in build script

firstSteps: Check CI logs for exact error message
Identify which stage failed (install, build, deploy)
commonChecks: All dependencies are listed in package.json
Source files exist in expected locations
escalationPath: Search existing issues for similar errors
Check GitHub Actions logs for details
Create new issue with reproduction steps if unresolved
